title: trichanthemis glabriflora
intro: Trichanthemus glabriflorus, commonly known as the glabrous trichanthemus or yellow daisy, is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Trichanthemus glabriflorus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions.
